examples: The smoke arose from the forest fire
The mist uprose from the meadows

meanings.definition: increase in value or to a higher point
examples: the value of our house rose sharply last year
The enemy army came nearer and nearer
New buildings are going up everywhere

meanings.definition: go upward with gradual or continuous progress
examples: Did you ever climb up the hill behind your house?

meanings.definition: burn completely; be consumed or destroyed by fire
examples: The mountain of paper went up in flames
The mountaineers slowly ascended the steep slope
